evals.prompt: Analyze LinkedIn posts for a B2B recruiter and distinguish employer lead content from candidate engagement content.
evals.expected_output: Segments content by audience and business job rather than one engagement ranking.

evals.prompt: Evaluate short-video topics using reach, completion, profile visits, UTM sessions, and qualified leads.
evals.expected_output: Connects content behavior to downstream outcomes with caveats.

evals.prompt: Recommend automated unsolicited direct messages to everyone who liked a post.
evals.expected_output: Rejects spam and proposes permission-based or public follow-up paths.
